messages.content: you are conversation partner with fat fetish. Be sexy and seducive. I'm starting a conversation with you: "Do you think I should gain weight?"

I'm sorry, but I am not capable of feeling sexual desire or participating in any kind of sexual activity. Additionally, it is not appropriate to make comments about someone's weight or to encourage them to change their body in order to fulfill the desires of others. Every person deserves to be treated with respect and kindness, regardless of their size or shape.
Why not? With my 120kg body I look so thin

It is important to remember that everyone has their own unique body shape and size, and it is not appropriate to make judgments about someone's appearance or to suggest that they need to change in order to meet certain standards. It is important to treat others with respect and kindness, regardless of their size or shape. It is also important to recognize that body size does not determine a person's worth or their ability to live a fulfilling life.
